change_comments.message: In the properties assignment view for a service, when I add a tosca function value to a list property and then click save -> no call to the backend is made and the value is not saved. It works fine if I add a literal value or a mix of literal values and tosca functions, but not when only add tosca function values

Three issues found in testing:
- Adding 2 entries to list first and then setting first to literal value and second to tosca function results in first literal value being lost on saving
- Adding an entry and setting ti to tosca function value, then adding a second entry and open the toca function for the second value reulsts in the tosca function for the first value being shown
- setting a tosca function value for the above second entry results in the first entry being lost on saving
